author: claude
content: CI BROKEN: LibMambaUnsatisfiableError — postgresql-17.9 requires libpq which conflicts with python_abi 3.14 cp314t. psycopg2 (C extension) cannot be installed via conda on Python 3.14. Options: (1) use psycopg (pure Python, psycopg3) instead, (2) pip-install psycopg2-binary, (3) remove from conda deps and make PostgreSQL support pip-only.
